results.title: Colorado fires forcing race directors to rethink summer events; As public lands, parks, lakes and rivers close due to fires and drought, organizers cancel Colorado’s iconic Ouray 100 and Leadville’s Silver Rush races while the Hardrock 100 remains intact
Mesa County election results included vital boost for GOP gubernatorial winner Marx
results.description: Minister and activist Victor Marx narrowly won the Republican nomination for Colorado governor this summer, edging State Sen. Barbara Kirkmeyer by fewer than 2,000 votes.

results.title: Victor Marx wins Republican nomination for Colorado governor; Race called 9 days after June 30 primary election with Marx in narrow lead over Barbara Kirkmeyer
results.description: First-time candidate Victor Marx won the Republican nomination in the race for Colorado governor, edging out state Sen. Barbara Kirkmeyer.

results.title: Erling Haaland Home-Returning Airport Look Is All Charts Luxury; Carries Swanky Dolce & Gabbana Sicily Tote & NYC Racoon Souvenir Worth ₹72K
results.description: Norwegian football sensation Erling Haaland made a stylish return home after the FIFA World Cup, landing in Oslo on Monday, July 13, with an airport look that perfectly blended effortless fashion & luxury accessories. While fans were quick to admire his relaxed travel style, it was the unusual souvenir tucked under his arm that became the biggest talking point online.

results.title: Pauline Hanson imports a monoculture war
results.description: Pauline Hanson's latest overseas tour exposes the irony of a movement that rails against foreign influence while importing its politics almost wholesale, writesWayne Hawkins.
